message:
feat: polish with markdown rendering, pagination, and loading states

Replace naive line splitting with react-markdown for proper heading,
list, and code block rendering. Add page-based pagination for large
sessions (200 messages per page). Show loading state via opacity
transition during navigation. Document DB_PATH in .env.example.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
